# Captain Edu - University Application Assistance

## About
Captain Edu helps South African students with university and TVET college applications.

## Key Pages

### Home
URL: https://captainedu.captainstech.co.za/
Description: Main landing page with overview of services

### APS Calculator
URL: https://captainedu.captainstech.co.za/aps-calculator
Description: Calculate your Admission Point Score instantly

### Prospectuses
URL: https://captainedu.captainstech.co.za/prospectus
Description: Browse and download university prospectuses

### Bursaries
URL: https://captainedu.captainstech.co.za/bursaries
Description: Find and apply for bursaries and funding

### Past Papers
URL: https://captainedu.captainstech.co.za/question-papers
Description: Download past exam papers and memos

### Apply for Assistance
URL: https://captainedu.captainstech.co.za/apply
Description: Get professional help with your application

## Navigation
- Home: /
- APS Calculator: /aps-calculator
- Prospectuses: /prospectus
- Bursaries: /bursaries
- Past Papers: /question-papers
- Apply: /apply
